content:
# Convolutional Neural Networks

**Summary**: A class of deep neural networks most frequently based on the convolution operation.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2023]] used CNN architectures to develop autoencoders for feature extraction.

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] used CNNs for image classification on lithofacies and volcanic ash datasets.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] used CNNs for image classification on lithofacies and volcanic ash datasets.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- CNN-based autoencoders significantly outperformed T1CN-based ones for encoding seismic data. ([[2023-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2023, p. 101]])

- Traditional CNN-based approaches achieved 86.9% accuracy on the volcanic ash dataset, outperformed by SSL models. ([[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025, p. 13]])
